REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, PLAINTIFF HOTEL ASTORIA INC.'S MOTION TO RECONSIDER ORDERS OF MARCH 9, 2015. SHALL BE HEARD BY THE HONORABLE CHARLES HAINES. PARTIES ARE ORDERED TO CONTACT DEPARTMENT 505 AT (415) 551-3796 TO COORDINATE A NEW HEARING DATE. MOVING PARTY IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH SFLR 2.6B AND PROVIDE COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING AND REPLY PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 501 NO LATER THAN MAY 18, 2015 WITH A COVER LETTER INDICATING THAT THE MATTER IS TO BE HEARD BY THE HONORABLE CHARLES HAINES. JUDGE RONALD E. QUIDACHAY, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED (D501)

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HOTEL ASTORIA INC. TAKE NOTHING FROM DEFENDANT TUDURY, ARTURO AS TRUSTEE OF THE TUDURY TRUST BUSH GRANT, LLC CORDRAY, LISA A AS TRUSTEES OF THE TUDURY KEESING PROPERTIES TRUST DATED DECEMBER 10, 2009 DEVOY, JAMES C. ON THE COMPLAINT, SAID DEFENDANT TO HAVE JUDGMENT THEREON FOR $2,815.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,815.00, ; JUDGMENT IS HEREBY ENTERED IN FAVOR OF DEFENDANTS IN ACCORDANCE WITH THE FOREGOING ORDER. HAI IS ORDERED TO PAY THE SUM OF $2,815.00 TO DEFENDANTS BUSH-GRANT, LLC AND ARTURO F. TUDURY AND LISA A. CORDRAY, AS TRUSTEES OF THE TUDURY KEESING PROPERTIES TRUST DATES DECEMBER 10, 2009. HAI SHALL TAKE NOTHING AS AGAINST DEFENDANTS. NO SASE; CONFORMED COPY IN DEPT. 501'S OUTBOX.(SEE SCANNED JUDGMENT)

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-21-2015 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-22-2015 Continued To Sep-09-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Plaintiff'S Motion To Reconsider Orders Of March 09, 2015.
Off Calendar May-29-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Attorney Carlos F. Negrete (by phone)949-493-8115 for Hotel Astoria Inc. the moving party.
Mara Boundy 415-344-7173 for Bush-Grant LLC, Tudury-Keesing Trust and James C. Devoy opposing party.

After hearing arguments from both parties in the matter of Motion for Reconsideration. The Motion is Denied.
Motion for reconsideration is untimely per CCP 1008. Notice of Entry of the Orders re: Demurrer and Motion to Expunge was served on March 13, 2015 personally. The deadline to file the motion was March 23, 2015. Plaintiff served the motion by fax at 5:00 p.m. on March 24, 2015 and filed it on March 25, 2015.

Defendant fails to state new facts, circumstances, or law pertinent to (1) the deficiencies in the complaint;(2) failure to file a timely opposition to the motions; (3) and failure to exercise Plaintiff's rights under CCP 472.
Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge Charles F. Haines, Clerk J. Rumsey, Not Reported. (505)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-11-2015 Continued To Jul-08-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of And Motion To Reconsider Orders Of March 9, 2015.
Off Calendar May-18-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF HOTEL ASTORIA INC.'s Motion To Reconsider Orders Of March 9, 2015. Shall be heard by the honorable Charles Haines. Parties are ordered to contact Department 505 at (415) 551-3796 to coordinate a new hearing date. Moving party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6B and provide courtesy copies of the moving and reply papers to department 501 no later than May 18, 2015 with a cover letter indicating that the matter is to be heard by the honorable Charles Haines. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not reported (D501)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Expunge Lis Pendens And For Award Of Attorneys Fees And Costs
Off Calendar Mar-13-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:Attorney Mara Bundy of Perkins Cole, 415-344-7173 for Defendant Tudury Trust the moving party./ Attorney Paul Horcher 415-385-2992 specially appearing for Plaintiff Hotel Astoria Inc. the opposing party.

After hearing arguments from both parties in the matter of DEFENDANTS BUSH GRANT LLC, ARTURO TUDURY and LISA CORDRAY's Motion To Expunge Lis Pendens And For Award Of Attorneys Fees And Costs is GRANTED. Attorney's Fees granted in the amount of $2,815. No opposition filed. Order signed and filed in open court. Judge Charles F. Haines, Clerk J. Rumsey, Not Reported. (501)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-13-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:Attorney Mara Bundy of Perkins Cole, 415-344-7173 for Defendant Tudury Trust the moving party./ Attorney Paul Horcher 415-385-2992 specially appearing for Plaintiff Hotel Astoria Inc. the opposing party.

After hearing arguments from both parties in the matter of DEFENDANTS ARTURO TUDURY, LISA CORDRAY, BUSH GRANT L L C, JAMES DEVOY DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED without leave to amend. No opposition filed. Order signed and filed in open court. Judge Charles F. Haines, Clerk J. Rumsey, Not Reported. (501)
